Published: May 11, 2026 | Last reviewed: May 11, 2026

Metformin 500 mg — Uses, Dosage, Side Effects Pakistan

TL;DR — Key Takeaways
  • Metformin Type 2 diabetes ka first-line dawai
  • PCOS mein insulin resistance aur cycle regular karta
  • Khaane ke saath ya foran baad lein — pet kharab kam
  • Long-term use mein Vitamin B12 deficiency check
  • Severe kidney disease mein avoid

Metformin 500 Kya Hai?

Metformin (brand name Glucophage) Pakistan ki sab se commonly prescribed diabetes medicine hai. Yeh biguanide class ki dawai hai jo do tareeqe se kaam karti hai:

  1. Liver mein glucose production kam karti hai
  2. Body cells ki insulin sensitivity barhati hai
Metformin — Quick Facts
Generic nameMetformin Hydrochloride
Brand namesGlucophage, Metsil, Mefor, Diaformin
Strengths500 mg, 850 mg, 1000 mg, XR (extended release)
ClassBiguanide (anti-diabetic)
OTCPrescription only
Pakistan price~120-200 PKR for 30 tablets

Metformin Kis Liye?

1. Type 2 Diabetes (Sab Se Common)

First-line treatment — sab se safe aur effective. Pakistan mein 90%+ Type 2 diabetics Metformin pe shuru hote hain.

2. PCOS (Polycystic Ovary Syndrome)

Insulin resistance address karta hai, periods regular karta hai, aur hairsutism kam. Pakistan mein PCOS bohat aam — 5 mein se 1 aurat.

3. Pre-Diabetes

HbA1c 5.7-6.4% mein progression rokne ke liye.

4. Gestational Diabetes

Pregnancy mein insulin alternative ya supplement.

5. Weight Management (Off-Label)

Insulin resistance wale obese patients mein.

6. Anti-Aging Research

Studies dikha rahi hain ke longevity mein madad — aur zyada research zaruri.

Dosage

Type 2 Diabetes:

Starting dose500 mg once daily with dinner
After 1 week500 mg twice daily (breakfast + dinner)
After 2-3 weeks500 mg three times daily ya 1000 mg twice daily
Maximum dose2,000-2,500 mg per day
Best timeKhaane ke saath ya foran baad

PCOS:

500 mg twice daily, 4-6 mahine ka trial.

Slow Titration Important:

Pet kharab kam karne ke liye dose slowly barhayein. Achanak high dose mein bohat zyada side effects.

Side Effects

Common (10-30% mein, especially shuru mein):

  • Loose motion / dast (sab se common)
  • Mitli, ulti
  • Pet dard, gas
  • Metallic taste
  • Bhook na lagna (weight loss bhi possible)

Tip: Yeh symptoms 1-2 hafton mein kam ho jate hain. Khaane ke saath lene se bohat madad. Extended-release (XR) version mein side effects kam.

Long-Term Risks:

  • Vitamin B12 deficiency — anemia, fatigue, neuropathy. Saal mein check karwayein.
  • Lactic acidosis (rare, serious) — muscle pain, fast breathing, weakness

Kab Metformin Avoid Karein?

  • Severe kidney disease (eGFR < 30) — bilkul avoid
  • Moderate kidney disease (eGFR 30-45) — dose reduce
  • Heart failure (severe)
  • Liver disease (advanced)
  • Severe dehydration
  • Surgery / IV contrast scan — temporarily hold karein
  • Severe infections
  • Alcoholism

Diabetes ya PCOS ke liye treatment plan? Ilaaj AI pe endocrinologist se mashwara — lab tests, dose adjustments, ghar baithe.

Specialist Se Milein

B12 Deficiency Check

Long-term Metformin (1+ year) Vitamin B12 absorption kam karta hai. Saal mein 1 baar B12 level check karwayein. Symptoms:

  • Thakawat
  • Hath payon mein numbness ya tingling
  • Memory issues
  • Anemia (paleness, weakness)

Solution: B12 oral supplement (1000 mcg daily) ya monthly injection.

Drug Interactions

  • IV contrast (CT scan ke liye): 48 ghante pehlay aur baad Metformin band
  • Alcohol: Lactic acidosis risk barha
  • Diuretics: Kidney function impact
  • Steroids: Blood sugar barhati hain — Metformin effect kam
  • Cimetidine, Trimethoprim: Metformin level barha

Pregnancy aur Breastfeeding

  • Pregnancy: Generally safe (Category B). Gestational diabetes aur PCOS pregnancy mein common use.
  • Breastfeeding: Small amount baby tak pohnchti hai — generally safe.

Metformin XR (Extended Release)

Once-daily option, side effects kam. Brands: Glucophage XR, Metsil XR. Slightly mehngi magar compliance behtar.

Lifestyle Changes Zaruri

Metformin akelay kafi nahi — ye points zaruri hain:

  • Diet: White rice/roti kam, sabzi aur protein zyada
  • Exercise: Roz 30 minute walk
  • Weight loss: 5-10% wazan kam = bohat improvement
  • Regular monitoring: HbA1c har 3 mahine
  • Foot care (diabetic patients mein)

Pakistan Mein Common Misuse

  • Khaali pet lena — bohat zyada side effects
  • Achanak high dose start karna
  • B12 levels check na karwana
  • Lifestyle changes ignore karna
  • Symptoms theek lagne pe band karna

Conclusion

Metformin Pakistan mein diabetes aur PCOS ka safest, sasta aur most effective first-line treatment hai. Khaane ke saath shuru karein, dose slowly barhayein, aur saal mein B12 check karwayein. Sirf dawai kafi nahi — diet aur exercise saath chahiye. Ilaaj AI pe endocrinologist se mashwara, dose adjustments, aur lab monitoring, ghar baithe.

Frequently Asked Questions

Metformin 500 kis liye use hoti hai?
Metformin Type 2 diabetes ka first-line treatment hai — Pakistan mein 90%+ diabetics is se shuru hote. Aur common uses: PCOS (insulin resistance, periods regular), pre-diabetes (progression rokne), gestational diabetes, aur off-label weight management. Sirf doctor parchee se. Sasta aur safe option hai.
Metformin ki ek din mein kitni dose?
Type 2 diabetes mein starting dose 500 mg once daily with dinner, phir 1 hafte baad 500 mg twice daily, 2-3 hafte baad 500 mg three times daily ya 1000 mg twice daily. Maximum 2,000-2,500 mg per day. PCOS mein 500 mg twice daily. Khaane ke saath lein — pet kharab kam.
Metformin ke side effects kya hain?
Common (especially shuru mein): loose motion (sab se common), mitli, ulti, pet dard, gas, metallic taste, bhook na lagna. Yeh symptoms 1-2 hafton mein kam ho jate hain. Long-term: Vitamin B12 deficiency (saal mein check), rare lactic acidosis. Khaane ke saath lein, dose slowly barhayein, B12 supplement consider karein.
Metformin PCOS mein kitne din mein faida deti hai?
PCOS mein Metformin ka asar slow hai — 4-6 mahine ka trial chahiye. Insulin resistance address karne mein 3 mahine, periods regular hone mein 4-6 mahine. Saath mein lifestyle changes (5-10% weight loss, diet, exercise) zaruri hain. Acne, hair growth aur fertility mein bhi faida ho sakta hai. Sirf Metformin se sufficient nahi.
Pregnancy mein Metformin safe hai?
Haan, Metformin pregnancy mein generally safe (FDA Category B). Gestational diabetes aur PCOS pregnancy mein commonly use hoti hai. Insulin alternative ho sakti hai. Breastfeeding mein bhi safe — small amount baby tak. Magar doctor mashware se hi shuru karein, regular monitoring zaruri. PCOS conceive karne mein bhi madad deti hai.
